title: StackPicks · Tremor + Recharts — dashboards in minutes

rows.title: Tremor = dashboard primitives
rows.desc: Cards, KPIs, sparklines, donut charts, deltas. All Tailwind. All copy-paste ready.

rows.title: Recharts = the chart engine
rows.desc: Tremor's charts are Recharts under the hood. When you need custom — go deeper.

rows.title: Build a full dashboard in 60 min
rows.desc: Stripe-quality KPI cards + line charts + filters. No D3 PhD required.

install.body: Tremor v3 went the shadcn route — components copied into your repo. Full control, no version lock-in.

rows.title: vs Chart.js
rows.desc: Chart.js is canvas-based. Tremor uses SVG (Recharts). Easier to style with Tailwind.

rows.title: vs Ant Design Charts
rows.desc: Antd brings opinionated everything. Tremor is just the dashboard bits. Lighter.

rows.title: vs D3 from scratch
rows.desc: D3 is powerful but lonely. Tremor + Recharts = 80% of dashboards in 10% of the code.

take.use_if: You're building an admin dashboard, analytics screen, or SaaS reporting view. Tremor + Recharts gets you to ship in a day.
take.skip_if: You need exotic chart types (Sankey, network graphs, geo maps). Drop to Visx or D3 for those edges.
take.sub: Both MIT. Tremor by tremor.so. Recharts by community.

more.body: Visx · ECharts · Apex · Chart.js · D3. Curated takes.
more.sub: 10 picks · all open source · updated this week

caption_line: Dashboards in an hour — Tremor + Recharts. Stripe-quality KPIs, charts, deltas. Both free, both Tailwind. Comment DASHBOARD for the kit ↓
